data.cta_english: Is Lautaro Martinez Inter's best leader? Comment below!

segments.voice_english: A relentless South American forward left his homeland early, but he conquered European football instead.
segments.image_query: dramatic South American football stadium night lighting
segments.subtitle_english: A relentless South American forward left his homeland early, but he conquered European football instead.
segments.voice_hindi: एक अथक दक्षिण अमेरिकी फारवर्ड ने अपनी मातृभूमि जल्दी छोड़ दी, लेकिन इसके बजाय उसने यूरोपीय फुटबॉल पर विजय प्राप्त की।

segments.voice_english: To achieve that level, Lautaro Martinez worked endlessly until Inter Milan brought him over.
segments.subtitle_english: To achieve that level, Lautaro Martinez worked endlessly until Inter Milan brought him over.
segments.voice_hindi: उस स्तर को हासिल करने के लिए, लुटारो मार्टिनेज ने तब तक अथक प्रयास किया जब तक इंटर मिलान ने उन्हें अपने पास नहीं ले लिया।

segments.voice_english: And it got better when the famous Italian club named him their permanent captain.
segments.image_query: Lautaro Martinez Inter Milan captain armband
segments.subtitle_english: And it got better when the famous Italian club named him their permanent captain.
segments.voice_hindi: और यह तब बेहतर हुआ जब प्रसिद्ध इतालवी क्लब ने उन्हें अपना स्थायी कप्तान नामित किया।

segments.voice_english: That same leader also leads the Argentina attack because his country trusts his talent.
segments.subtitle_english: That same leader also leads the Argentina attack because his country trusts his talent.
segments.voice_hindi: वही नेता अर्जेंटीना के आक्रमण का नेतृत्व भी करता है क्योंकि उसका देश उसकी प्रतिभा पर भरोसा करता है।

segments.voice_english: So this striker proved his worth after he rose from hopeful kid to leader.
segments.subtitle_english: So this striker proved his worth after he rose from hopeful kid to leader.
segments.voice_hindi: इसलिए इस स्ट्राइकर ने आशावान बच्चे से नेता बनने के बाद अपनी योग्यता साबित की।

data.youtube_title: Lautaro Martinez: Zero Se Inter Captain! 💔🔥
title_options: Lautaro Martinez: Zero Se Inter Captain! 💔🔥
Lautaro Martinez Ka Secret Success Safar 😱🏆
Lautaro Martinez Ne Kaise Badli Kismat? 🤯⚽
data.description: Lautaro Martinez ki struggle story sunke hosh ud jayenge! 🥹 South America se nikal kar Inter Milan ka captain aur World Cup champion banne tak ka safar insane hai. 🔥 Kya Lautaro Martinez abhi duniya ka best striker hai? Comment me batao! 👇⚽
